name: The Seasonal Courts
description: Welcome to the Seasonal Courts, lands of eternal Spring, Summer, Autumn and Winter. Sold to fae parents as an infant, you've spent your entire life in a court of your choosing. Now, living as an adult with your adoptive sister, you spend your days going about your routine. But....there could also be more in store, should you play your cards right, see where the story goes.
creator: GilgameshNEO
